name: 工作与职业
subject: inquiry
domain_name: 经济活动 / Economic Systems / Economic Systems
curriculum_points: Students will be able to explore a variety of occupations and describe how different jobs contribute to the functioning of a community. (Age 5-7)
Students will be able to analyze the interdependence of jobs within an economic system and the skills and education required for different roles. (Age 7-9)
